about.title: The Essence
about.subtitle: of the Brand
about.desc1: Born in the streets, grown with culture. Distrito ZLG is more than a brand - we are a movement wearing the authenticity of urban youth.
about.desc2: Since 2025, we create pieces that speak the language of the streets. Each piece is designed for those who aren't afraid to express themselves, who live intensely and want their clothes to reflect that energy.
about.originText: It all started when two friends got together in early 2025 with a simple idea: to create clothes that represent our vibe, our culture, our way of seeing the world.
about.originText2: From conversations at the bus stop, Distrito ZLG was born. "ZLG" are the initials of the founders who dared to dream big.
about.futureText: Our goal is simple: to be the brand that represents Brazilian urban youth. We want to be in every corner, at every party, in every important moment.
about.futureText2: We are expanding, but without losing our essence. Every new city, every new customer, is part of our ever-growing urban family.
about.authText: Every design is born from the street, for the street. No fuss, just attitude.
about.creativityText: Urban art that you wear. Every print tells a unique story.
about.communityText: More than customers, we are a crew. United by urban passion.
about.qualityText: Premium fabrics, long-lasting prints. Made to resist the streets.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Distrito ZLG collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our website and services.
privacy.p1: When making purchases or registering, we collect only the necessary data: name, email, phone, and delivery address. We do not store sensitive payment information on our servers.
privacy.p2:
We use your information exclusively to:
- Process and deliver your orders
- Send updates about your purchase
- Provide promotions and news (only if authorized)
privacy.p3: We use industry-standard security measures to protect the personal information you provide to us. Access to data is restricted and performed only by parties necessary to complete your purchase.
privacy.p4: We do not sell or rent your information to third parties. Sharing occurs only with third-party logistics and payment companies strictly to enable and deliver your order.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms and Conditions govern your use of the Distrito ZLG website and the purchase of our products.
terms.p1: By using our website and making purchases, you legally agree to comply with these terms in their entirety. If you do not agree with any provision set forth, please discontinue use of the site.
terms.p2: All our pieces are limited and may sell out. We do not guarantee the restock of specific items. Product colors may vary slightly depending on the monitor or screen on which they are being viewed.
terms.p3: Prices are subject to change without notice. The price charged will be the one displayed at the time of order confirmation and payment.
terms.p4: Customers have up to 7 calendar days after receipt to request an exchange or return of the product due to regret. The item must be in its original packaging, with tags, and without signs of use or washing.
